title: Tested Assembly Record
description: Documents a specific assembly configuration validated by a specific test under a specific standard. Immutable once created.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this tested assembly record.

title.description: Human-readable description of the tested configuration.

test_standard_ref.description: Reference ID of the test method standard from the shared standards registry.

result.description: Test outcome: pass/fail, rating achieved, classification, or measured value.

status.description: Current status of this test record.

assembly_ref.description: Reference to the assembly_system this test validates.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the test report or evidence document.

notes.description: Additional notes about the test configuration or results.
